overall.description: First-person motorcycle gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, riding through wet industrial outskirts of Night City at night. The player navigates multi-lane roads, stops at traffic signals, and transitions from industrial zones toward the neon-lit downtown skyline.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial highway with overhead power lines

agents.ego_description: accelerating on wet multi-lane industrial road, weaving slightly between lanes

notable_agents.action: black car driving ahead in same direction

entered.detail: large industrial complex with illuminated MILSTRM signage on facade
concrete overpass structure spanning the multi-lane road
tall metal lattice tower with multiple power lines
illuminated advertising screen on building side

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wet industrial highway at night, with the motorcycle accelerating along multi-lane asphalt. The MILSTRM industrial building dominates the right side while power transmission towers line the left. Overpasses loom ahead as the rider navigates through sparse traffic.

events.description: approaching red traffic light and decelerating to stop
traffic light changes from red to green
executing right turn at intersection onto narrower industrial road

agents.ego_description: coming to complete stop at red light, then accelerating through green and turning right

notable_agents.action: van waiting at intersection to the right

entered.detail: suspended traffic signal showing red then green
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt
tropical palm tree silhouetted against sky

segments.scene_description: The rider approaches a controlled intersection, stopping at a red traffic light surrounded by industrial buildings. After the light turns green, the motorcycle accelerates and executes a right turn onto a narrower industrial street, leaving the main highway behind.

events.description: city skyline becomes visible in the distance between industrial buildings

agents.ego_description: cruising through narrow industrial corridor, accelerating toward visible city lights

entered.detail: tall concrete barrier with weathered surface and graffiti
chain-link security fencing along right side of road
large painted MILSTRM logo on concrete wall
distant illuminated skyscrapers of downtown district

segments.scene_description: Driving through a narrow industrial corridor flanked by concrete walls and security fencing. The MILSTRM graffiti marks the left wall while the distant city skyline becomes visible ahead, signaling the transition from industrial outskirts toward the urban center.

agents.ego_description: accelerating on elevated roadway toward the illuminated downtown skyline

entered.detail: metal guardrails lining the elevated roadway edges
tall illuminated towers with neon signage dominating the horizon
metal framework structures alongside the road
large illuminated advertisement with purple and pink lighting

segments.scene_description: The motorcycle emerges onto an elevated highway with the downtown skyline growing larger ahead. Industrial scaffolding and neon billboards line the route as the rider accelerates toward the dense cluster of illuminated skyscrapers visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense urban neon district with security checkpoints

events.description: passing through security gate structure into denser urban zone

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense urban streets, passing under neon signs and billboards

notable_agents.action: car driving ahead through the gate checkpoint

entered.detail: checkpoint structure with vertical bars and illuminated number 11
large vertical billboard with WET DREAM text and graphic
tightly packed commercial buildings with multiple neon signs
elevated pedestrian bridge connecting buildings across the street

segments.scene_description: The rider passes through a security gate checkpoint into the dense neon district. The WET DREAM billboard dominates the left side while overhead walkways and tightly packed buildings with vibrant neon signage create a canyon-like urban environment. The motorcycle continues through the wet streets reflecting the colorful city lights.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective on a motorcycle as it transitions from a wide industrial highway into a narrow urban corridor leading toward the city center. It begins with a rapid acceleration along wet, multi-lane asphalt, flanked by the massive MILSTRM industrial building and towering power transmission lines. As the rider approaches a controlled intersection, the momentum pauses at a red traffic light before the camera pivots right, leaving the main highway for a tighter industrial street. The scene then shifts into a confined corridor enclosed by concrete walls and security fencing, where MILSTRM graffiti lines the path. Finally, the narrow passage opens up visually as the distant, glowing city skyline emerges ahead, signaling the move from the outskirts toward the urban heart.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a motorcycle travels from an open industrial highway into the claustrophobic, neon-drenched heart of the city. It begins on an elevated road where industrial scaffolding and billboards line the route, with the distant downtown skyline growing larger as the rider accelerates. As the motorcycle passes through a security gate checkpoint, the open horizon shifts into a dense urban canyon defined by tightly packed buildings and overhead walkways. The scene then immerses itself in the vibrant neon district, dominated by a massive Wet Dream billboard on the left, before gliding through wet streets that reflect the colorful city lights.
